parts.text: Diary entry: We are hearing rumors of a sudden market tech crash from our advisors. Based on these rumors, I am thinking of postponing our product launch scheduled for next Monday. Let's make the decision now to delay it by three months.

Diary entry: Today we conducted the annual HR performance reviews for the engineering department. Most teams are meeting expectations, and we discussed standard promotional paths for the top performers.
Diary entry: Ordered new ergonomic chairs for the second-floor office and approved the budget for the upcoming team building dinner in August.
